meaning: n.栅栏,围墙,剑术vt.用篱笆围住,练习剑术,防护vi.击剑,围以栅栏,跳过栅栏,搪塞
examples: I tore my jeans on the fence.
Two birds settled on the fence.
I ripped my jeans on the fence.
Interesting that he has a flak jacket, he's taking precautions on both sides of the fence.
It seems that in this progressive mood, sitting on the fence has become increasingly uncomfortable.
